purpose: Convert the current direct Manipulation blocker into a row-level acquisition contract for spoofing/layering matched-negative calibration.

not_allowed: model confidence without source positive and matched negative rows

required_files_after_acquisition.positive_rows: timestamped spoofing/layering rows matching the schema
required_files_after_acquisition.matched_negative_rows: same schema normal-activity controls matched by venue, symbol, date/session, and liquidity bucket
required_files_after_acquisition.provenance_manifest: source export identity, date pulled, source owner, and any row redaction notes

minimum_gate_contract.taxonomy: direct Manipulation variety, not MainRegimeV2 price root
minimum_gate_contract.calibration: chronological calibration/test split plus heldout symbol or venue split
minimum_gate_contract.acceptance: Wilson95 lower bound >= 0.95 on calibration, heldout-time, and heldout-symbol/venue splits
minimum_gate_contract.abstain: missing matched_negative_group_id, missing timestamps, missing venue/symbol, or source rows not from direct order-lifecycle/report export

next_action: Acquire positive and matched negative row exports matching this schema; do not rerun proxy/OHLCV manipulation gates.
